init.title: Savant Energy Options
init.description: Configure advanced options. Ports typically remain on defaults.

user.title: Savant Energy — Choose Mode
user.description: Select your Savant firmware version. Use Auto to let the integration detect it automatically.

legacy_setup.title: Legacy Setup (firmware <11.2)

data_description.address: IP address of your Savant Power Control Bridge (PBC).

legacy_setup.description: Legacy mode uses the original snapshot and DMX workflow. Only the PBC IP is required.

current_setup.title: Current Setup (firmware ≥11.2) — Device IPs

data_description.address: IP address of your Savant Power Control Bridge (PBC).
data_description.host: IP address of your Savant RPM Host — the machine running InfluxDB (usually your main Savant controller).

current_setup.description: Enter the IP addresses for the PBC and the RPM host.

current_auth.title: Current Setup — InfluxDB Authentication

data.influx_auth_method: How to obtain the Influx token

data_description.influx_auth_method: Choose 'Paste Token' if you already have the read token, or 'Fetch via SSH' to have the integration retrieve it automatically using the RPM user credentials.

current_auth.description: The integration needs an InfluxDB read token to pull energy data. Choose how you'd like to provide it.

current_token.title: Current Setup — Influx Read Token

data_description.influx_token: Paste the InfluxDB read token from your Savant host. You can find it at: /home/RPM/.remote/rpm_modules/rpm-energy/current/influxdb/read.token

current_token.description: Paste the InfluxDB read token from your Savant host.

current_ssh.title: Current Setup — SSH Auto-Fetch

data_description.ssh_password: Password for the 'RPM' user account on the Savant host. The integration will SSH in and retrieve the Influx read token automatically.

current_ssh.description: Enter the RPM user password. The integration will connect via SSH and fetch the Influx token from the host.

auto_probe.title: Auto Detect — PBC IP

data_description.address: IP address of your Savant Power Control Bridge (PBC).

auto_probe.description: Enter your PBC IP address. The integration will probe for a legacy activity feed and configure itself accordingly.

auto_current_host.title: Auto Detect — Legacy Feed Not Found

data_description.host: IP address of your Savant RPM Host — the machine running InfluxDB.

auto_current_host.description: The legacy activity feed was not detected on your PBC. Enter the RPM host IP to continue with the current API (firmware ≥11.2).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure — Choose Mode
reconfigure.description: Select the operating mode. Choose Legacy for firmware <11.2 or Current for firmware ≥11.2.

reconfigure_legacy.title: Reconfigure — Legacy Mode

data_description.address: IP address of your Savant Power Control Bridge (PBC).

reconfigure_legacy.description: Confirm or update the PBC IP address for legacy mode.

reconfigure_current_host.title: Reconfigure — Device IPs

data_description.address: IP address of your Savant Power Control Bridge (PBC).
data_description.host: IP address of your Savant RPM Host — the machine running InfluxDB.

reconfigure_current_host.description: Confirm or update the IP addresses for the PBC and RPM host.

reconfigure_auth.title: Reconfigure — InfluxDB Authentication

data.influx_auth_method: How to obtain the Influx token

data_description.influx_auth_method: Choose 'Paste Token' if you already have the read token, or 'Fetch via SSH' to have the integration retrieve it automatically using the RPM user credentials.

reconfigure_auth.description: Choose how the integration should authenticate with InfluxDB.

reconfigure_token.title: Reconfigure — Influx Read Token

data_description.influx_token: Paste the InfluxDB read token from your Savant host. Found at: /home/RPM/.remote/rpm_modules/rpm-energy/current/influxdb/read.token

reconfigure_token.description: Paste the InfluxDB read token from your Savant host.

reconfigure_ssh.title: Reconfigure — SSH Auto-Fetch

data_description.ssh_password: Password for the 'RPM' user account on the Savant host. The integration will SSH in and retrieve the Influx read token automatically.

reconfigure_ssh.description: Enter the RPM user password. The integration will connect via SSH and fetch the Influx token from the host.

error.invalid_address: Please enter a valid IP address.
error.ssh_unavailable: The paramiko library is not installed. SSH token fetch is unavailable — paste the token manually instead.
error.ssh_token_empty: SSH connection succeeded but the token file was empty or not found. Verify the host is running rpm-energy ≥11.2.
error.ssh_failed: Could not connect via SSH. Check the Host IP address and the RPM user password.
